reasoning: Developing a new vaccine and receiving official approval takes years. There is currently no approved specific gonorrhea vaccine, and the pipeline does not feature candidates that would be approved by early 2026. While the MenB vaccine (Bexsero) provides partial cross-protection, the Wikipedia article for 'List of infectious diseases' has consistently listed the status as 'No' up to late October 2025. It is extremely unlikely to genuinely change to 'Yes' within a 1-to-3-month horizon. Any 'Yes' status would likely be a transient undocumented edit regarding the MenB vaccine, but those usually revert quickly.
